description: R-3 session-9: v7.77 retired. Envelope absent + [FAN-IN] colon-suffix subject. Post-R-2, this path is unreachable in production — both inbox paths (file-inbox line 320, redis-inbox line 393) rstrip(':,') before promote, so envelope_gap_id arrives clean and the session-3 guard fires. Handler-level fallback now returns gid with colon intact; load_gap(_GAP_ID_RE end-anchor) blocks it safely. See fileinbox_pos_colon_stripped_v7_77.json for the real production path.
